subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Most Glorious Beauty! The letter dated the fifth of Sha'ban of this year, which thou hadst addressed to Áqá Siyyid Asadu'lláh [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال ابهی نامه پنجم شعبان سنه حالیه که به آقا سید اسدالله مرقوم نموده بودید
subcodes.subjects: @travels to Egypt by Abdu'l-Baha, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
